debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
n k : ℕ
hn : n ≠ 0
hk : k ≠ 0
ε δ : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hδ : δ > 0
hunif : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε
hfine : 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ
j : ℕ
hj : j ∈ Finset.range n
ℓ : ℕ
hℓ : ℓ ∈ Finset.range k
⊢ |(↑ℓ + 1) * (b - a) / (↑n * ↑k) - (b - a) / ↑n| ≤ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n

proof:
have h_ba : 0 < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
    have h_n : (n : ℝ) > 0 := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn
    have h_k : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk
    have h_ℓ : (ℓ : ℝ) + 1 ≤ k := by norm_cast; exact Finset.mem_range.1 hℓ
    rw [abs_le]
    constructor <;> { field_simp [h_n.ne', h_k.ne', Nat.cast_mul]; nlinarith [h_ba, h_ℓ, h_n, h_k] }
successful_attempts:
have h_ba : 0 < b - a := sub_pos.mpr hab
    have h_n : (n : ℝ) > 0 := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn
    have h_k : (k : ℝ) > 0 := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hk
    have h_ℓ : (ℓ : ℝ) + 1 ≤ k := by norm_cast; exact Finset.mem_range.1 hℓ
    rw [abs_le]
    constructor <;> { field_simp [h_n.ne', h_k.ne', Nat.cast_mul]; nlinarith [h_ba, h_ℓ, h_n, h_k] }
